Related Entities

  • hospital MERCYONE DUBUQUE MEDICAL CENTER 5-star overall rating
  • hospital FINLEY HOSPITAL 4-star overall rating
  • hospital MERCYONE DYERSVILLE MEDICAL CENTER
  • snf Harmony Dubuque 2-star, 75 beds
  • snf Dubuque Specialty Care 2-star, 84 beds
  • snf Stonehill Care Center 4-star, 185 beds
  • snf Luther Manor at Hillcrest 2-star, 103 beds
  • snf Sunnycrest Manor 3-star, 77 beds
  • snf Ennoble Nursing and Rehab 5-star, 85 beds
  • snf Hawkeye Care Center Dubuque 4-star, 80 beds
  • snf Accura Healthcare of Cascade LLC 5-star, 46 beds
  • snf Bethany Home 5-star, 66 beds
  • snf Grand Meadows Senior Living & Health Care 2-star, 32 beds
  • snf Mount Carmel Bluffs 5-star, 60 beds
  • snf MercyOne Dyersville Senior Care 5-star, 40 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
